title: Workforms: Can I have conditional questions from a conditional question?

posts.author: PhilLBSU (Phillip Buck)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I have had multiple requests from staff to move their JotForm’s over to Monday.com, however many of these JotForm’s have conditional questions that follow from a response to another conditional question.

As an example

Question 1: Single Select
A. B. C.
Conditional MM Based on Question 1: Answer A
A. B. C.
Conditional MN Based on Conditional MM: Answer B
A. B. C.
Conditional LL Based on Question 1: Answer C
A. B. C.
Conditional LM Based on Conditional LLL Answer B
A. B. C

I need to be able to have multiple conditional questions following from other conditional questions, otherwise I’ll have to make multiple separate forms, or a massive form in total that has been completely redesigned. Is there currently a way to have conditional questions that follow from a condition within a conditional question within workforms?

Thank you.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PhilLBSU

Our monday app EasyForm allows you to set conditional logic without a depth limit.

Here for example we have 4 Status columns each depending on the previous one having A selected:
